calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2013 Off Calendar

Req For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Yolanda Huang, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Nicky Trasvina.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Eber Flamenco aka Eber Esquivel and Gina Esquivel.
Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Cort Ordered Defendants Does 1-50 Dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Nicky Trasvina Sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $32,314.29 (Pre-Judgment Interest included)
Costs: $964.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $33,278.79
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
